description_long: This is a double-sided booth-style chaise, commonly found in urban environments such as diners, cafes, or public waiting areas. It features two wide, flat seating surfaces upholstered in a rich, reddish-brown faux leather or vinyl, separated by a vertical wooden divider. The backrests are tall and vertically channeled, providing both comfort and a visually striking ribbed texture. The base is constructed from a sturdy black material, likely metal or painted wood, with four robust legs supporting the structure. The overall design is modern yet functional, with clean lines and a focus on durability and ease of maintenance. The absence of armrests and the symmetrical layout make it suitable for high-traffic, communal spaces.
description: A double-sided, booth-style chaise with ribbed brown upholstery, a central wooden divider, and a sturdy black base. Designed for communal seating in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the central wooden divider and both seating surfaces, highlighting the chaise's double-sided design.
description_view_1: Front view of one seating side, displaying the vertically channeled backrest and wide seat cushion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the central divider and both seats visible.
description_view_3: Front view of the second seating side, identical to view 1, showing the ribbed backrest and seat.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and vertically segmented with deep channeling, creating a ribbed appearance. It is slightly curved for ergonomic support and extends the full width of each seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, rectangular, and robust, made from black-finished material, likely metal or painted wood, with a simple, utilitarian design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a vertically channeled pattern, giving the backrest a ribbed texture, while the seat is smooth and solid in color.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, attached seat cushions and two tall, attached backrest cushions, one set on each side of the central divider, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
